chapter_title.ar: باب قَتْلِ الْعَمْدِ وَ شِبْهِ الْعَمْدِ وَ الْخَطَإِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – Deliberate killing, and somewhat deliberate, and the erroneous (killing)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: رَجُلٍ ضَرَبَ رَجُلًا بِعَصاً فَلَمْ يَرْفَعِ الْعَصَا حَتَّى مَاتَ قَالَ يُدْفَعُ إِلَى أَوْلِيَاءِ الْمَقْتُولِ وَ لَكِنْ لَا يُتْرَكُ يُتَلَذَّذُ بِهِ وَ لَكِنْ يُجَازُ عَلَيْهِ بِالسَّيْفِ .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu nasr, from Musa Bin Bakr,

(It has been narrated) from Abd Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), regarding a man who struck a man with a stick, so he did not raise the stick (stop) until he died. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be handed over to the guardian of the killed one, but he should not be left to enjoy the pleasure of it, but the sword should be allowed upon him’.
